SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ANTONIO TABORA BONERJES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESSIVE FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BONERJES, ANTONIO TABORA $2,253.21 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,358.21 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
